overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city street with wet reflective surfaces, neon signage, and palm trees. The camera moves along a commercial sidewalk before stopping at a crosswalk to wait for futuristic vehicles to pass. The scene features modern glass architecture and a hazy, overcast atmosphere typical of high-end game engine rendering.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wet futuristic commercial street lined with palm trees and towering glass buildings adorned with neon advertisements. The camera moves steadily forward on the sidewalk, passing by storefronts while vehicles drive by on the multi-lane road to the right. The atmosphere is hazy with recent rain, creating reflective surfaces on the pavement.

events.description: camera stops at crosswalk to wait for vehicles to pass
large black utility truck drives through the intersection
futuristic maroon sports car approaches and stops at the crosswalk line

agents.ego_description: standing at the crosswalk waiting for a gap in traffic to cross the street

notable_agents.action: man in green jacket holding umbrella, standing at crosswalk looking at phone
futuristic maroon sports car stopped at the crosswalk facing the camera

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the wet road
tall pole with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing lights
short yellow and black striped posts lining the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Stopped at a yellow-striped crosswalk waiting for traffic to clear. A pedestrian in a green jacket stands nearby holding an umbrella while various futuristic vehicles including a large truck and a sleek maroon sports car pass through or stop at the intersection. The surrounding architecture features modern white geometric buildings and towering skyscrapers visible through the haze.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a rain-slicked cyberpunk thoroughfare that transitions from a steady walk to a stationary wait at a busy intersection. It begins by gliding forward along a commercial sidewalk, passing towering glass buildings and neon advertisements while palm trees line the route. As the camera moves through the hazy atmosphere, the reflective pavement mirrors the surrounding lights and the flow of traffic on the adjacent multi-lane road. The scene then shifts as the camera comes to a halt at a yellow-striped crosswalk, where the perspective opens up to reveal a pedestrian with an umbrella and a stream of futuristic vehicles, including a large truck and a maroon sports car. Finally, the view settles on the intersection, framed by modern white geometric architecture and skyscrapers looming through the mist.
